email_body:
Neon Logo ( https://neon.tech?ref=%5BAutomated%5D%5BGrowth%5D+Production+Checklist )



*****************************

Project

todo app production checklist

*****************************



Your

project is starting to see steady usage. Here's a personalized checklist of settings to help get your

Neon database ready for production. Upgrade to a paid plan ( https://console.neon.tech/app/billing?ref=%5BAutomated%5D%5BGrowth%5D+Production+Checklist#change_plan )for more resources and configuration.



Checkbox



High Performance Production Branch

----------------------------------



Production databases need reliable performance. Make sure to disable cold starts to auto scale your production branch and disable scale to zero to prevent any cold-starts Configure default compute settings ( https://console.neon.tech/app/projects/mute-bonus-21776085/branches/br-ancient-smoke-ah2uj91z?ref=%5BAutomated%5D%5BGrowth%5D+Production+Checklist )



Incomplete



Set minimum compute to at least 1 CU



Current minimum: 0.25 CU



Completed



Set maximum compute to 2 CU



Current maximum: 2 CU



Completed



Disable scale to zero



Current state: Enabled



Checkbox



Analytics and Reporting Replica

-------------------------------



Reduce load on your primary compute by offloading analytics, reporting, and read-only traffic to

read replicas. Create a read replica ( https://console.neon.tech/app/projects/mute-bonus-21776085/branches/br-ancient-smoke-ah2uj91z?ref=%5BAutomated%5D%5BGrowth%5D+Production+Checklist )



Incomplete



Add a read replica to offload read-only traffic



Current number of read replicas: 0



Checkbox



Restore Window for Accidental Loss

----------------------------------



Protect your production data from accidental loss. We recommend keeping at least a 7-day restore

window for quick data recovery and analysis.



Incomplete



Increase your project's restore window to 7 days



Current restore window in days: 0.3



Checkbox



Secure your database

--------------------



Secure your database by limiting connections to trusted IP addresses. Configure an IP allow list

to permit only specific IPs or ranges. Upgrade to restrict database access to trusted IPs ( https://console.neon.tech/app/projects/mute-bonus-21776085/settings/network-security?ref=%5BAutomated%5D%5BGrowth%5D+Production+Checklist )



Incomplete



Restrict database access to trusted IPs



Current state: Not Configured



Neon, LLC - A Databricks Company



neon.com ( https://neon.com?ref=%5BAutomated%5D%5BGrowth%5D+Production+Checklist )



209 Orange Street



Wilmington, DE 19801, USA
